available_ribbons.name: ASD Mission Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for participation in ASD-designated missions supporting House Wolf operational objectives.

available_ribbons.name: 1 Year Service Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for one year of honorable service within House Wolf.

available_ribbons.name: 2 Year Service Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for two years of honorable service within House Wolf.

available_ribbons.name: 3 Year Service Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for three years of dedicated service within House Wolf.

available_ribbons.name: 4 Year Service Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for four years of continued service and commitment to the organization.

available_ribbons.name: 5 Year Service Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for five years of distinguished service to House Wolf.

available_ribbons.name: House Wolf Contributor
available_ribbons.description: Recognizes members who have contributed to the growth, development, or support of House Wolf.

available_ribbons.name: Discord Booster Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded to members who support the House Wolf Discord server through boosting.

available_ribbons.name: NCO Service Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded to Non-Commissioned Officers for leadership and service within House Wolf.

available_ribbons.name: Officer Service Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded to Officers for leadership, command responsibility, and organizational impact.

available_ribbons.name: Mine or Die Mission Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for participation in smaller-scale or support operations.

available_ribbons.name: PackTracker Beta Team
available_ribbons.description: Awarded to members who participated in testing and development of PackTracker.

available_ribbons.name: Pyro Service Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for operations conducted in the Pyro system.

available_ribbons.name: QV Station Intel Mission Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for participation in intelligence and reconnaissance missions.

available_ribbons.name: Rockbreaker Mission Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for mining and resource extraction missions.

available_ribbons.name: Star Citizen Supporter Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded to individuals who have demonstrated ongoing support and dedication to the Star Citizen project.

available_ribbons.name: Stormbreaker Mission Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for participation in high-risk or large-scale operations.

available_ribbons.name: Tactical Strike Group Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for coordinated combat operations with tactical strike teams.

available_ribbons.name: Wolf Dragoon Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded to elite members demonstrating exceptional combat capability.

available_ribbons.name: Xeno Threat Mission Ribbon
available_ribbons.description: Awarded for participation in XenoThreat-related operations.
